category_sources: Official SourceForge opencore-amr project describes audio codecs extracted from Android Open Source Project and a modified Fraunhofer AAC decoder/encoder library.
source_facts.description says fdk-aac is a standalone library of Fraunhofer FDK AAC code from Android.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project has a dedicated `fdk-aac` Git repository under opencore-amr.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project page is the best available official documentation surface for the fdk-aac distribution.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge fdk-aac code browser is the source-control project URL.
Official SourceForge opencore-amr page lists a Git repository named `fdk-aac`.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge project categorizes it as Sound/Audio and Libraries and lists C as the programming language.
source_facts.description identifies an AAC library extracted from Android.
